case_title: CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA N.A. VS. KATHY RONG et al

calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-04-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Diane Wick, clerk-beth wilber, reporter-brenda fields, 9:35AM:
c/c for court trial, Phil Kilduff appearing for Raymond Patenaude, no appearance by pro per defendant Kathy Rong, case proceeds as a prove-up without defendant. Mr. Kilduff waives opening statements and begins case in chief by asking the court to take judicial notice of the declaration of plaintiff in lieu of live testimony at trial filed on 10/11/02, and the court to note that the defendant was mailed a copy. After detailing the terms of the agreement Mr. Kilduff submits the matter.
The Court rules:
Attorney fees of $1275.00, costs of $164, $9316.43 principal, and 10% per annum interest of $579.69, for total damages of $11,335.12.
Judge Wick signs the judgment and Plaintiff is to file and serve judgment.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-04-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2002 Set For Trial On Nov-04-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
